description: This pipeline modifies the specified annotations to the specified values and outputs the annotated images. It starts by modifying the annotations, then it outputs the images.

349eb848-c055-4adb-8105-c1ede0ca85d9.name: annotate-set
349eb848-c055-4adb-8105-c1ede0ca85d9.description: Modifies the specified annotations to the specified values. Supports expressions to combine existing annotations or generate new values.
